creator: rmacklem@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Alan Somers from comment #0)
Do you raelly want to try and do this?
(mountd does it and it is not simple or straightforward.)

For your example, it would have to "somehow" determine
that XXX is not a valid hostname or netgroup name.

As far as I am concerned, doing it in mountd is sufficient.
